title: Action Deck
description: An entire card system with customizable and easy to add cards from other mods
body: --- # Action Deck Action Deck is a Fabric mod that adds fully data-driven collectible playing cards and interactive deck stacks to Minecraft. Create custom cards, build themed decks, shuffle stacks, draw cards, and mix cards from completely different decks together. ## Features - Fully data-driven cards - Custom deck definitions - Interactive deck stack block - Shuffle decks in-world - Draw cards directly from stacks - Mix cards from multiple decks - Resource-pack compatible textures - Easy command support ## How It Works Cards and decks are loaded from datapacks, making the mod highly customizable without needing code changes. Deck stacks placed in the world can: - Store multiple cards - Be shuffled by sneaking and right-clicking - Allow drawing cards one at a time - Accept additional cards manually - Automatically remove themselves when empty Cards are not restricted to a single deck, so you can create completely mixed stacks and custom gameplay systems. ## Commands ```text /actiondeck card give /actiondeck deck give /card give ``` ## Perfect For - RPG servers - Board game systems - Casino minigames - Trading card systems - Adventure maps - Custom collectible systems - Datapack-heavy modpacks ## For Developers & Datapack Creators Action Deck is designed around JSON-driven content and resource packs. If you want to create custom cards, decks, or integrations, full documentation and source code are available on GitHub. More information can be found [Github](https://github.com/SuperHeroPuppy/action_deck) ## License MIT License ---
